name: Jellyfin Diagnostics
description: Admin diagnostics plugin for detecting common Docker/Unraid configuration issues in Jellyfin 10.11.x.
overview: Analyzes Jellyfin server configuration and environment to detect hardware acceleration, volume mapping, permission, and networking issues. Optionally forwards sanitized reports to any OpenAI-compatible AI endpoint for analysis.

versions.changelog:
Adds a proper Settings page (configPage.html) with form fields for AI integration toggle, endpoint URL, API key, and log lines to scan. Clicking Settings next to the plugin in Dashboard -> Plugins now shows a working configuration form. The separate Diagnostics entry in the admin side menu continues to serve the dashboard view for running scans.

**Install / upgrade:** via the Jellyfin plugin catalog using the repository URL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Atvriders/jellyfin-plugin-diagnostics/master/manifest.json
